RangeBooker

Join the RangeBooker Member Portal

Create an account to request access, manage range bookings, and keep your member information up to date.

Simple online member signup experience
Future login support for returning members
Can be tied directly to your SharePoint member list

Create Your Account

This is a demo signup page. Right now it can either show a success message or post to your API once we wire it up.

Demo version: for now this can just “show off” the flow. When ready, we connect it to a backend route like /api/registerMember.
